zone_name: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

1735.name: The Quartz Stairs
1735.description: The stairs are beautiful, but they fall short of majestic, which was the architect's original intent. They lead into a small temple to the east, and down to Temple Street to the west.

e.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

1736.name: Chapel
1736.description: The ceiling is vaulted and supported by marble columns rubbed smooth by thousands of hands. Niches filled with statues of the idols surround this circular room. A cloistered area is reached by a small door to the east.

e.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

s.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

w.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

1737.name: Receiving Chamber
1737.description: This small chamber has cushions on either side so that visitors can be comfortable during their wait for the prior.

e.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

w.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

npcs.name: Deacon Jones
npcs.description: He's an unassuming man with unassuming ways.  The only thing that he assumes is that unless you are a cleric of some sort then you are scum.

2762.name: The Sanctum
2762.description: This large and comfortable chamber is used by the clergy to discuss matters of import to their vocation. There is a small trapdoor set in the floor tiles.

w.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

npcs.name: Prior Faraday
npcs.description: Prior Faraday is old, wise, and stern.  He helps those who help the church.

1739.name: The Room of The Guards
1739.description: This room is the second line of defense of the temple treasury. It is the place of honor for those who have sworn their lives to the church.

s.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

npcs.name: Fanatic warrior
npcs.description: His eyes bulge with his unquestioning faith.

1740.name: The Hall of the Eternal
1740.description: This room stinks of the undead. Your stomach clutches itself and your skin turns suddenly cold.

s.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate

npcs.name: Morbifice
npcs.description: outdated. It is animated only by its unconquerable faith in its religion.

1741.name: The Room of the Vortex
1741.description: A massive copper toroid sits in the center of the room.

npcs.name: Energy guardian
npcs.description: feeling that someone is behind you.

1738.name: The Secret Passage
1738.description: The hair stiffens on the back of your neck. You realized that you have stumbled into a very dangerous place. You have heard the rumors of the horrors that guard the treasures of this temple. Precautions must be taken at every step or your doom will be assured.

e.to_zone: Oldtown Temple District - City of Oldgate
